line: % A percent comment closes at the synthetic line ending.
Text remains readable in Ελληνικά, 日本語, café, and astral 𝌆.
An escaped percent \% is text, while the rest is a comment. % trailing note
Body text has a footnote[7]{Nested {content} and $x_7$.}
Parenthesized math \(E = mc^2\) also ends here.
